report_message: Ours is a lightweight sixth method but does not beat BM25 on NQ 100.
Ours is much more stable than truncate when answer evidence is late.
Ours trails BM25 overall, beats LongLLMLingua on hotpotqa and multifieldqa_en, and trails it on 2wikimqa.
Keyword protection contributes the clearest gain; naive middle-aware reordering is not consistently positive.
1500 tokens is the recommended cost-quality trade-off; 2000 adds small quality gain with higher cost.
